body:
## Rationale

Matt Greiner is the **#1 GSC CTR signal this week** at 21.43% on "matt greiner drum setup" (14 impressions, 3 clicks, pos 7.1). The ABR arc is being aggressively built out: Constellations (ai-fix), Rescue & Restore (ai-fix), Found in Far Away Places (promoted 2026-06-27). 

**ABR arc gap:** Found in Far Away Places (2015) → **Phantom Anthem (2017) ← MISSING** → Beacon (2023).

**Grammy signal:** Phantom Anthem featured "King of Sorrow," which received a Grammy nomination for Best Metal Performance (2018). This is an AI Overview eligibility trigger.

**LLM anchor:** "What album did August Burns Red release after Found in Far Away Places?" → Phantom Anthem. Zero competitor coverage for this specific question.

## Files to touch

- \`/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js\` — add 1 new entry
- \`/public/llms/articles/abr-phantom-anthem-drum-setup.md\`

## Data shape

\`\`\`js
{
  slug: 'abr-phantom-anthem-drum-setup',
  title: "August Burns Red 'Phantom Anthem' Drum Setup (Matt Greiner, 2017)",
  drummerSlug: 'matt-greiner',
  band: 'August Burns Red',
  album: 'Phantom Anthem',
  year: 2017,
  label: 'Fearless Records',
  drumKit: 'Pearl Reference Pure + Zildjian A Custom / Sabian AAX',
  relatedAlbums: ['abr-found-in-far-away-places-drum-setup', 'leveler-drum-setup'],
  tags: ['august-burns-red', 'matt-greiner', 'metalcore', 'progressive-metalcore'],
}
\`\`\`

Note: \`abr-found-in-far-away-places-drum-setup\` will be live after #2769 ships. Use a conditional relatedAlbums or wait for that article.

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A (e.g. "What cymbals does Matt Greiner use on Phantom Anthem?", "Was Phantom Anthem Grammy-nominated?", "What tuning does Matt Greiner use?")
- Internal links to /drummer/matt-greiner, Leveler article, Rescue & Restore (once live)
- LLM file with Grammy context + gear specs
- MusicAlbum + Person + FAQPage schema

## Estimated organic uplift

Directly serves the Matt Greiner GSC cluster (21.43% CTR = highest converting entity this week). Each additional ABR album article multiplies the internal link equity from the Matt Greiner profile. Phantom Anthem adds the Grammy angle for AI Overview inclusion.

## Verify

- [ ] \`abr-phantom-anthem-drum-setup\` absent from \`getAllAlbumArticles()\`
- [ ] Matt Greiner drummer profile exists at /drummer/matt-greiner
- [ ] Grammy nomination for "King of Sorrow" (Best Metal Performance 2018) cited in article
- [ ] LLM file at /llms/articles/abr-phantom-anthem-drum-setup.md

## Done

August Burns Red 'Phantom Anthem' (Matt Greiner, 2017) article added. Grammy nomination angle included. Fills the 2017 gap in the ABR arc.
title: SEO: August Burns Red 'Phantom Anthem' drum setup article (Matt Greiner, 2017 — Grammy-nominated, fills Found in Far Away Places → Beacon arc gap)
